overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring an ancient city at night. The character traverses elevated ledges, waterfront promenades with classical architecture, and narrow alleyways while carrying a torch, showcasing detailed stone temples, bridges, and residential structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone ledge overlooking ancient city district

events.description: ambient light fades significantly as dusk transitions to deep night
character descends from high ledge to waterfront level below

agents.ego_description: standing on a high stone ledge surveying the illuminated city below, then beginning to move toward the edge

entered.detail: elevated stone platform overlooking the city with rough hewn texture
cluster of stone buildings with flat roofs and courtyards visible below
tall palm trees rising between buildings in the distance
illuminated rectangular pool surrounded by stone architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high stone ledge overlooking an ancient city at dusk. The character stands surveying the scene as natural light fades rapidly to night, revealing illuminated courtyards and palm trees below before transitioning to the waterfront.

events.description: character now in white robes at ground level, significant outfit change from previous segment
character pauses briefly near the brazier before continuing along the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path in light-colored robes, passing a large burning brazier on the right

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing by the water's edge facing away from the path

entered.detail: stone-tiled walkway running alongside the water
large circular stone fire pit with bright flames
calm waterway reflecting the night sky and lights
tall stone wall separating the path from buildings above

segments.scene_description: The character now appears in white robes walking along a waterfront promenade at night. A large burning brazier illuminates the right side while two NPCs stand by the water's edge. The path continues toward a distant bridge with stone walls on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside walkway beneath classical stone bridge and temple

events.description: character now in dark armor holding a lit torch, approaching an ornate stone bridge
torchlight illuminates the stone bridge arch and classical statue as character passes underneath
character slows pace while navigating past fire braziers along the embankment

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge holding a torch, illuminating the classical architecture, bridge, and temple surroundings

entered.detail: large arched stone bridge with decorative pillars and statues crossing the water
tall stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal near the bridge
grand building with tall columns and triangular pediment on elevated ground
raised stone walkway edge with steps leading down to the water
series of burning fire bowls lining the path

segments.scene_description: Now in dark armor and carrying a torch, the character explores a riverside promenade featuring an impressive stone bridge with classical statues. The torch illuminates the path as the character passes beneath the bridge arch, with a grand columned temple visible across the water and fire braziers lining the embankment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone staircase ascending from waterfront to upper courtyard

events.description: character begins ascending a wide stone staircase away from the water
emerging from the stairway into an open columned courtyard

agents.ego_description: climbing a grand stone staircase while holding the torch, passing under a pergola structure at the top

entered.detail: wide marble steps ascending between stone walls
tall fluted classical columns supporting an overhead structure
wooden lattice roof supported by columns covering the stairway
open paved area at the top of the stairs with buildings surrounding it

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase leading away from the waterfront, moving under a covered pergola structure supported by tall fluted columns. The torch illuminates the marble steps and ivy-covered walls as the character emerges into an upper courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between residential stone buildings

events.description: entering a narrow alleyway with ivy-covered walls and wall-mounted torches
character passes close to building walls, temporarily narrowing the field of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow winding alleyways, passing NPC pedestrians and wall-mounted torches

notable_agents.action: robed pedestrian walking down the alley toward the character
figure in white robes standing at the top of the stairs in the distance

entered.detail: confined cobblestone passage between tall stone buildings
two-story stone houses with wooden doors and small windows
green ivy vines growing down the stone wall surface
burning torches mounted on the walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through narrow cobblestone alleyways between stone residential buildings covered in ivy. Wall-mounted torches provide warm illumination as the character passes pedestrians, including a figure approaching from the opposite direction and another standing at a distant stairway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a high vantage point overlooking an ancient city at dusk into the intimate, torch-lit depths of its residential quarters at night. It begins on a high stone ledge as the natural light fades rapidly, revealing illuminated courtyards and palm trees before the camera descends to a waterfront promenade. As the character moves along the water's edge past burning braziers, the scene shifts toward a grand stone bridge adorned with classical statues and a columned temple reflecting in the river. The path then leads upward, ascending a grand marble staircase beneath a fluted pergola and ivy-covered walls before emerging into an upper courtyard. Finally, the camera weaves through narrow cobblestone alleyways between stone buildings, where wall-mounted torches cast a warm glow over passing pedestrians.
